summary: Frontend testing completed for 6 pages fixed to connect to backend API instead of mock data. All 9 test features passed successfully.
seed_data_creation: Business account test_biz_settings_check@test.com created via API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 pages (InfluencerSettingsPage, BusinessSettingsPage, BusinessPreferencesPage, CreateDigitalTwinPage, DigitalTwinProgressPage, DigitalTwinIntroPage) are now connected to real backend APIs. Mock data has been removed.

influencer_settings_page.no_mock_payment_sections: PASS - No mock invoice/payment sections found
influencer_settings_page.quick_links_correct: PASS - Edit Profile -> /influencer-profile, Edit Preferences -> /influencer-preferences, Edit Digital Twin -> /create-digital-twin

business_settings_page.no_mock_invoice_sections: PASS - No mock invoice/payment sections found

business_preferences_page.loads_saved_preferences: PASS - Categories (Fashion & Apparel, Beauty & Personal Care), Tones (Professional), Regions (UK, US) pre-selected on revisit

create_digital_twin_page.page_renders: PASS - Page renders with Digital Twin Studio header
create_digital_twin_page.generate_button: PASS - Generate Twin button found (disabled until photo and voice provided)

digital_twin_progress_page.page_renders: PASS - Page renders with progress title
digital_twin_progress_page.progress_steps: PASS - All 4 steps found (Analyzing photo, Processing voice, Generating avatar video, Finalizing)
digital_twin_progress_page.polls_api: PASS - Page polls userApi.getMe() for job status

digital_twin_intro_page.page_renders: PASS - Page renders with 'Meet Your Digital Twin' title
digital_twin_intro_page.avatar_video_section: PASS - Video preview section with play button found
digital_twin_intro_page.publish_button: PASS - Publish Avatar Video button found
digital_twin_intro_page.social_buttons: PASS - Instagram, TikTok, YouTube post buttons found
digital_twin_intro_page.dashboard_button: PASS - Go to Dashboard button found

features_tested: 1. InfluencerSettingsPage at /influencer-settings loads real user email (not 'creator@example.com') - PASS
2. InfluencerSettingsPage has no mock payment/invoice sections - PASS
3. InfluencerSettingsPage Quick Links point to correct routes (/influencer-profile, /influencer-preferences, /create-digital-twin) - PASS
4. BusinessSettingsPage at /business-settings loads real user email (not 'business@example.com') - PASS
5. BusinessSettingsPage has no mock invoice/payment sections - PASS
6. BusinessPreferencesPage at /business-preferences loads saved preference data on revisit (categories, tones, regions pre-selected) - PASS
7. CreateDigitalTwinPage at /create-digital-twin renders with photo upload and voice recording sections - PASS
8. DigitalTwinProgressPage at /digital-twin-progress renders with progress steps and polls API - PASS
9. DigitalTwinIntroPage at /digital-twin-intro loads and shows avatar video section - PASS

mocked_apis.digital_twin_apis: Clone/voice/video APIs are real external services - pages render correctly and attempt API calls
